status_notes: New program launched ~June 2026; report-intake channels not yet documented here.
notes: Coordinated Vulnerability Disclosure (CVD) program for critical open-source software, operated by a single shared Security Incident Response Team (SIRT) under the Linux Foundation. Built on confidentiality-first principles and established standards/tooling (CVE, TLP, CWE, CVSS, EPSS, SSVC, VEX). See the organization record: secid:entity/akrites.org.

match_nodes.description: Akrites shared SIRT — coordinated vulnerability disclosure for critical open-source software

data.description: Neutral shared SIRT coordinating vulnerability disclosure and remediation across critical open-source projects, standing between reporters and upstream maintainers.
